infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app uses the camera to capture skin images for local image filtering.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app accesses photos so you can upload skin images for filtering.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: This app saves processed images to your photo library.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow this app to select images from your photo library.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow this app to take photos with the camera.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow this app to access your photos.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow this app to save processed images.
